source: PDF page 1: 'transfer.' appears on line 25, then blank line, then '[¶3]' on line 27, indicating proper spacing
note: The source PDF shows these elements on separate lines with a paragraph break between them. Standard legal formatting requires a space before paragraph markers. The DB ingestion process removed this space when flattening the text. Single occurrence, byte-exact replacement.
